title: Bell state
prompt: Write code that creates a 2-qubit Bell state (entangle q0 and q1 with H then CNOT) and measures both qubits. Use Qiskit or OpenQASM.
reference_notes: Must declare 2 qubits + 2 classical bits, apply H to q0, CX(q0,q1), and measure both. In Qiskit must import QuantumCircuit and not use removed APIs (execute/Aer from qiskit). In QASM2 must have the OPENQASM 2.0 header and declared registers.
